correction_note: Correction: compile-typescript was run; the immutable record limitation incorrectly says type-check was not run. The PR later closed without merge.
scope_note: Contributor self-run record of Northset’s own contribution; not the maintainer’s verification. The declared network-off check runs `npm run compile-typescript && npm run test-unit` on node:22-bookworm after a disclosed online install. It does not run lint, type-check, or the full upstream CI gates.
